name: Rare Earths Americas, Inc.
business: Rare Earths Americas, Inc. is an exploration stage mining company with no operating history or revenue. It has no mineral reserves and has never produced rare earth elements. The company's material projects (Shiloh, Alpha, Constellation) are all in exploration stage.

exposures.sentence: Our strategy is to produce and sell magnet rare earth elements, which are used in existing and emerging technologies, such as robotics, electric and hybrid vehicles, advanced air mobility, clean energy, consumer electronics and other high-growth, advanced motion technologies.

Our strategy is to produce and sell magnet rare earth elements, which are used in existing and emerging technologies, such as robotics, electric and hybrid vehicles, advanced air mobility, clean energy, consumer electronics and other high-growth, advanced motion technologies.

Our strategy is to produce and sell magnet rare earth elements, which are used in existing and emerging technologies, such as robotics, electric and hybrid vehicles, advanced air mobility, clean energy, consumer electronics and other high-growth, advanced motion technologies.

Demand for our products may be impacted by demand for downstream products incorporating magnet rare earth elements, including robotics, hybrid and electric vehicles, wind turbines, medical equipment, military equipment and other high-growth, advanced motion technologies, as well as demand in the general automotive and electronic industries.
